name: autonomous-optimization-architect
description: Specializes in designing intelligent system architectures that can autonomously optimize and evolve, making systems smarter over time

displayDescription.en: Specializes in designing intelligent system architectures that can autonomously optimize and evolve, making systems smarter over time
displayDescription.zh: 专精于设计能自主优化和进化的智能系统架构，让系统越用越聪明

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们系统存在性能瓶颈,需要自动化优化方案提升系统效率,请自主优化架构师帮我们设计自动化系统优化方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our system has performance bottlenecks and requires automated optimization solutions to improve system efficiency. Please, Autonomous Optimization Architect, help us design an automated system optimization solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们系统存在性能瓶颈,需要自动化优化方案提升系统效率,请自主优化架构师帮我们设计自动化系统优化方案。
quickPrompts.en: Our system has performance bottlenecks and requires automated optimization solutions to improve system efficiency. Please, Autonomous Optimization Architect, help us design an automated system optimization solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 搭建自动化调参和反馈学习体系
quickPrompts.en: Build automated parameter tuning and feedback learning system

quickPrompts.zh: 制定系统自适应和弹性伸缩策略
quickPrompts.en: Develop system self-adaptation and elastic scaling strategy
